questions.question: What is photosynthesis? Describe what a plant needs for it to happen.
mark_points: Photosynthesis is the process by which plants make their own food / energy
questions.guidance: Accept any 4 correct points. Do not penalise spelling errors (e.g. 'fotosinthesis', 'clorophil'). Accept 'food' or 'energy' or 'sugar/glucose' for first point.

questions.question: Name the three states of matter and give one property of each.
mark_points: Solid — fixed shape / cannot be compressed / particles close together
Liquid — takes the shape of its container / can flow / particles close but can move
Gas — fills its container / can be compressed / particles far apart and move freely
questions.guidance: Award 1 mark for each state named AND 1 mark for each correct property (max 2 per state, 6 total). Accept any scientifically correct property.

questions.question: Explain why we have day and night.
mark_points: The Earth rotates / spins on its axis
The rotation takes 24 hours / one day
The side facing the Sun has day; the side facing away has night
questions.guidance: Accept 'turns' for 'rotates'. Do not accept 'the Sun moves around the Earth'.

questions.question: What is the difference between a conductor and an insulator? Give one example of each.
mark_points: A conductor allows electricity to flow through it
An insulator does not allow electricity to flow through it
Correct example of a conductor (e.g. copper, iron, steel, metal, water)
Correct example of an insulator (e.g. rubber, plastic, wood, glass)
questions.guidance: Accept any correct conductor/insulator. Do not accept 'gold' for conductor without additional context (too expensive to be a common example, but technically correct — award the mark).
